error-board-notAdmin: Jo moatte admin wêze fan dit boerd om dat te dwaan
error-board-notAMember: Jo moatte lid wêze fan dit bestjoer om dat te dwaan
error-notAllowed: Your board role is not allowed to do that
error-json-malformed: Jo tekst is net jildich JSON
error-json-schema: Jo JSON-gegevens befetsje net de juste ynformaasje yn it juste formaat
error-csv-schema: Jo CSV (Comma Separated Values)/TSV (Tab Separated Values) befettet net de juste ynformaasje yn it juste formaat
error-import-empty-board: This export contains no board content (no swimlanes, lists or cards). It may have been created by an older WeKan version with a known export bug. Please re-export the board with the current version and import the new file.
export-card-excel-fields: Selektearje fjilden om op te nimmen yn Excel-eksport:
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Kin net eksportearje nei Excel: net genôch frije skiifromte
user-can-not-export-card-to-pdf: Brûker kin gjin kaart eksportearje nei PDF
user-can-not-export-card-to-excel: Brûker kin gjin kaart eksportearje nei Excel
filter-on-desc: Jo filterje kaarten op dit boerd. Klik hjir om filter te bewurkjen.
advanced-filter-description: Avansearre filter makket it mooglik om in tekenrige te skriuwen mei de folgjende operators: == != <= >= && || () In romte wurdt brûkt as skieding tusken de Operators. Jo kinne filterje foar alle oanpaste fjilden troch har nammen en wearden te typen. Bygelyks: Field1 == Wearde1. Opmerking: As fjilden of wearden spaasjes befetsje, moatte jo se ynkapselje yn inkele oanhalings. Bygelyks: 'Field 1' == 'Wearde 1'. Foar inkele kontrôlekarakters (' \/) dy't wurde oerslein, kinne jo \. Bygelyks: Field1 == Ik bin. Jo kinne ek meardere betingsten kombinearje. Bygelyks: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Normaal wurde alle operators fan links nei rjochts ynterpretearre. Jo kinne de oarder feroarje troch heakjes te pleatsen. Bygelyks: F1 == V1 && (F2 == V2 || F2 == V3). Jo kinne ek tekstfjilden sykje mei regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
header-logo-title: Gean werom nei jo boards side.
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Paste a Kanboard export JSON: an object with "columns" (or tasks carrying column_name) and a "tasks" array (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns become lists and tasks become cards.
import-board-instruction-deck: Paste a NextCloud Deck board JSON (a board with "stacks", each stack carrying its "cards"). Stacks become lists and cards become cards.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Paste an OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses become lists and work packages become cards.
import-board-instruction-issues: Paste a __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues become cards grouped into Open / Closed lists.
import-board-instruction-asana: Paste an Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } from the Asana export or GET /tasks). Tasks are grouped into sections (memberships); completed tasks go to Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Paste a ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages become lists and items become cards.
import-board-instruction-trello: Gean yn jo Trello-boerd nei 'Menu', dan 'Mear', 'Print en eksportearje', 'JSON eksportearje', en kopiearje de resultearjende tekst.
import-board-instruction-csv: Plak jo Comma Separated Values ​​(CSV)/ Tab Separated Values ​​(TSV) yn.
import-board-instruction-jira: Paste the JSON from the Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), or an equivalent { "issues": [...] } object. Jira statuses become lists and issues become cards. Optionally include an "automationRules" array to import rules.
import-board-instruction-excel: Choose a WeKan-style .xlsx spreadsheet (the same columns as the Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, dates, custom fields). The first row is the header.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Gean yn jo board nei 'Menu', dan 'Export board', en kopiearje de tekst yn it ynladen bestân.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: As jo ​​krije flaters by it ymportearjen fan board, wurket soms ymportearjen noch, en board is op All Boards side.
import-json-file: Or select a Trello JSON file
import-attachments-zip: Trello attachments ZIP (optional, from Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: One Trello board exported as .json. If you have saved Trello API key and token, its attachments, board background and member avatars are downloaded too.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: A .zip with one or more board .json files and their attachments in board-name subfolders (from the Trello Card Attachments Downloader). All boards are imported.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: No Trello board .json files were found in the .zip.
import-trello-zip-too-large: The .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: The .zip has too many files to import.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: A file inside the .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: The .zip contains unsafe file paths and was rejected.
import-trello-workspace-placeholder: Imported board is placed under this workspace, created if it does not exist
trello-api-import: Import directly from Trello with API key and token
trello-api-import-desc: Paste your Trello API key and token to list your Trello workspaces and boards, then import the selected ones with their attachments.
trello-api-token: Trello API token (manually generated below the API key)
trello-api-credentials-required: Please enter both the Trello API key and token.
trello-api-credentials-saved: Trello API key and token are saved. You can list workspaces without re-entering them.
trello-select-boards: Please select at least one board to import.
trello-cancel-delete-confirm: Cancel the import and delete the boards already imported by this job? This cannot be undone.
import-members-map: Jo ymportearre bestjoer hat guon leden. Map de leden dy't jo ymportearje wolle nei jo brûkers

list-archive-cards-pop: Dit sil fuortsmite alle kaarten yn dizze list fan it boerd. Om kaarten yn Argyf te besjen en werom te bringen nei it boerd, klikje op "Menu"> "Argyf".

r-workflow-help: Drag a trigger and an action into the builder, then add the rule. Drag an action onto an existing rule to change what it does.
r-import-trello: Import rules from Trello Butler (best effort)
r-import-paste: Paste exported rules (JSON or CSV) or Trello Butler commands here
r-import-trello-note: Trello board exports do not contain Butler rules. Paste Butler command text here to map the supported subset; unmapped lines are reported.
r-import-workflow-note: Import a visual workflow exported from n8n or Node-RED. Recognized trigger/action nodes are mapped to WeKan rules; unmapped nodes are reported.

roles-info: Choose which board roles are allowed to perform each action. Admin Panel users (global admins) always have all rights and cannot be restricted here.
delete-linked-card-before-this-card: Jo kinne dizze kaart net wiskje foardat jo earst keppele kaart wiske hawwe dy't hat
delete-linked-cards-before-this-list: Jo kinne dizze list net wiskje foardat jo earst keppele kaarten wiske hawwe dy't nei kaarten yn dizze list wize

invalid-domain: Invalid domain. Use a domain like example.com (no @ or spaces).
shared-templates-info: Browse users' shareable template boards, grouped by Organization, Team or email Domain. Select one or more scopes below to show the matching shared templates. Only users whose Templates board is not empty are listed.
shared-templates-select-scope: Select a scope above (Organizations, Teams or Domains) to show shared templates.
autoAddUsersWithDomainName: Foegje automatysk brûkers ta mei de domeinnamme
dueCardsViewChange-choice-all-descriptio: Toant alle ûnfolsleine kaarten mei in *Ferfallen* datum fan boards dêr't de brûker tastimming foar hat.
globalSearchViewChange-choice-all-descri: Search all cards on boards for which you have permission. Choose *My cards* to limit results to cards where you are a member or assignee.
dueCards-noResults-description: Jo hawwe op it stuit gjin kaarten mei ferfaldatum.
comment-not-found: Kaart mei opmerking mei tekst '%s' net fûn.
operator-limit-invalid: %s is gjin jildige limyt.  Limyt moat in posityf hiel getal wêze.
globalSearch-instructions-description: Sykopdrachten kinne operators befetsje om it sykjen te ferfine.  Operators wurde oantsjutte troch it skriuwen fan de operator namme en wearde skieden troch in kolon.  Bygelyks, in operatorspesifikaasje fan `list:Blocked` soe it sykjen beheine ta kaarten dy't opnommen binne yn in list mei de namme *Blokkearre*.  As de wearde spaasjes of spesjale tekens befettet, moat it tusken oanhalingstekens ynsletten wurde (bygelyks `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-board: `__operator_board__:<title>` - ​​kaarten yn boards dy't oerienkomme mei de opjûne *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-list: `__operator_list__:<title>` - ​​kaarten yn listen dy't oerienkomme mei de opjûne *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-swiml: `__operator_swimlane__:<title>` - ​​kaarten yn swimbanen dy't oerienkomme mei de opjûne *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-label: `__operator_label__:<color>` `__operator_label__:<name>` - kaarten mei in label dat oerienkomt mei *<color>* of *<name>
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_creator__:<username>` - ​​kaarten dêr't *<username>* de makker fan de kaart is
globalSearch-instructions-operator-org: `__operator_org__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kaarten dy't hearre by in boerd tawiisd oan organisaasje *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-team: `__operator_team__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kaarten dy't hearre ta in boerd tawiisd oan team *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​kaarten dy't oant *<n>* dagen fan no ôf binne.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ listet alle kaarten efter de deadline.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_created__:<n>` - ​​kaarten dy't makke binne *<n>* dagen lyn of minder
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​kaarten dy't binne wizige *<n>* dagen lyn of minder
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​wêrby *<field>* ien is fan `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` of `__predicate_member__`.  It pleatsen fan in `-` foar *<field>* siket nei it ûntbrekken fan in wearde yn dat fjild (bgl. `has:-due` siket nei kaarten sûnder in ferfaldatum).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​wêrby *<sort-name>* ien is fan `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` of `__predicate_modified__`.  Foar in delgeande sortearring, pleats in `-` foar de sortenamme.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​wêrby *<n>* in posityf hiel getal is dat it oantal kaarten útdrukt dat per side werjûn wurde moat.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Soartgelikense operators wurde *OR* tegearre.  Kaarten dy't oerienkomme mei ien fan 'e betingsten wurde weromjûn.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` soe kaarten weromjaan dy't opnommen binne yn elke list mei de namme *Blokkearre* of *Beskikber*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ferskillende operators wurde * EN * tegearre.  Allinnich kaarten dy't oerienkomme mei alle ferskillende operators wurde weromjûn.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` jout allinnich kaarten yn de list * Beskikber * mei in * read * label.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Dagen kinne wurde oantsjutte as in posityf of negatyf hiel getal of mei `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` of `__predicate_year__` foar de aktuele perioade.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Standert wurde argyfearre kaarten net trochsocht.

server-error-troubleshooting:
Stjoer de flater oanmakke troch de tsjinner yn.
Foar in snap ynstallaasje, rinne: `sudo snap logs wekan.wekan`
Foar in Docker-ynstallaasje, útfiere: `sudo docker logs wekan-app`

move-attachments-none-found: Nothing is stored on the selected source storage, so there is nothing to move.
attachment-repair-locations-description: Find attachments and avatars whose recorded storage (filesystem / GridFS / cloud) no longer matches where the file is, and fix the database to point at the real location.
default-save-storage-description: Choose the storage backend where newly uploaded attachments are saved.
mongodb-compact-description: After moving files out of MongoDB GridFS, the database file on disk does not shrink automatically. Running Compact reclaims freed space by rewriting the collection data. Only run this after bulk file moves are complete.
mongodb-compact-warning: Warning: Compact is a blocking operation that may take several minutes on large databases. On replica sets, all secondaries are compacted first (automatically), then the primary. On single-node replica sets used for oplog (common Meteor setup), only the primary is compacted.
mongodb-compact-running: Running compact, this may take several minutes...
invalid-file: As bestânsnamme ûnjildich is, wurdt upload of omneame annulearre.
preview-pdf-not-supported: Jo apparaat stipet gjin foarbyld fan PDF. Besykje ynstee te downloaden.
drag-board-to-workspace: Sleep boerd om ta te jaan oan __workspaces__ (drop op wurkromte yn sydbalke)
delete-translation-confirm-popup: Binne jo wis dat jo dizze oanpaste oersettingsstring wiskje wolle? Der is gjin undo.
import-board-zip: Add .zip triem dat hat board JSON triemmen, en board namme submappen mei taheaksels
support-info-not-added-yet: Stipe ynformaasje is noch net tafoege
support-info-only-for-logged-in-users: Stipe ynformaasje is allinich foar oanmelde brûkers.
accounts-lockout-info: Dizze ynstellings kontrolearje hoe't oanmeldpogingen wurde beskerme tsjin brute force oanfallen.
accounts-lockout-known-users: Ynstellings foar bekende brûkers (korrekte brûkersnamme, ferkeard wachtwurd)
accounts-lockout-settings-updated: Brute force beskerming ynstellings binne bywurke
accounts-lockout-locked-users-info: Brûkers op it stuit útsletten fanwegen tefolle mislearre oanmeldpogingen
accounts-lockout-no-locked-users: D'r binne op it stuit gjin beskoattele brûkers
accounts-lockout-user-unlocked: De brûker is mei súkses ûntskoattele
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock: Binne jo wis dat jo dizze brûker ûntsluten wolle?
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock-all: Binne jo wis dat jo alle beskoattele brûkers ûntsluten wolle?

avatars-path-description: Paad dêr't avatar triemmen wurde opslein

cron-job-delete-failed: It wiskjen fan plande taak is mislearre
cron-job-pause-failed: De plande taak kin net ûnderbrekke
cron-job-paused: Planne taak is mei súkses ûnderbrutsen
cron-job-resume-failed: De plande taak kin net ferfetsje
cron-job-resumed: De plande baan is mei súkses hervat

filesystem-enabled-description: Use local filesystem for file storage
s3-minio-storage-description: S3-compatible object storage: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces and others.
s3-force-path-style-description: Required by MinIO and most non-AWS S3-compatible servers.
azure-connection-string-description: Optional: use a full connection string instead of account name and key.
gcs-key-filename-description: Optional: path to a service account JSON key file on the server.
gcs-credentials-description: Optional: paste the service account JSON key. Leave blank to use the key file or default credentials.
gcs-permissions-note: Give WeKan's service account read/write access to the bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket → Permissions → Grant access. In "New principals", paste the service account email — the "client_email" value from your JSON key — then choose the role "Storage Object Admin" and Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Leave blank to keep the current value.
azure-account-name-description: The name of your Azure Storage account.
azure-container-description: The blob container to store files in.
gcs-bucket-description: The name of the Cloud Storage bucket to store files in.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: leave blank (uses the region endpoint). S3-compatible: the Endpoint URL from your MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → your user → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → choose use case 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Shown as 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Same screen as the Access key ID; 'Secret access key' is shown only once when the key is created — copy it then (or Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → name shown at the top (also under Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Data storage → Containers → your container (or + Container to create one).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → project selector at the top → your project's ID (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create to make one).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Path on the WeKan server to the downloaded service account JSON key file (created below). Use this OR paste the JSON into the field below.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → your service account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (downloads the file). Paste its contents here, or save the file and set its path above.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Move attachment to Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Move attachment to Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Brûk MongoDB GridFS foar bestân opslach
migration-stop-confirm: Binne jo wis dat jo alle migraasjes stopje wolle?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: To have attachments and avatars visible, move them from CollectionFS to any other Storage.
s3-access-key-description: AWS S3 tagong kaai foar autentikaasje
s3-bucket-description: S3 bucket namme foar it opslaan fan triemmen
s3-enabled-description: Brûk AWS S3 of MinIO foar bestân opslach
s3-secret-key-description: AWS S3 geheime kaai foar autentikaasje
s3-settings-save-failed: It bewarjen fan S3-ynstellingen is net slagge
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Fiert wiidweidige kontrôles en reparaasjes foar yntegriteit fan boardgegevens, ynklusyf listbestelling, kaartposysjes en swimlanestruktuer.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Wiskje lege dûbele listen feilich. Ferwideret allinich listen dy't gjin kaarten hawwe EN hawwe in oare list mei deselde titel dy't kaarten befetsje.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Fynt en herstelt kaarten en listen mei ûntbrekkende swimlaneId of listId. Makket in 'Lost Cards' swimlane om alle ferlerne items wer sichtber te meitsjen.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Herstelt alle argivearre swimbanen, listen en kaarten. Reparearret automatysk alle ûntbrekkende swimlaneId of listId om items sichtber te meitsjen.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Detektearret en reparearret ûntbrekkende of beskeadige listen yn 'e boerdstruktuer.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Updates avatar-URL's foar bestjoersleden om de juste opslach-backend te brûken en reparearret brutsen avatar-referinsjes.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Updates alle URL's foar bestânbylagen op dit boerd om de juste opslach-backend te brûken en reparearret brutsen triemferwizings.
migrations-description: Run gegevens yntegriteit kontrôles en reparaasjes foar dit boerd. Elke migraasje kin yndividueel útfierd wurde.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Dit sil in wiidweidige migraasje útfiere om de yntegriteit fan boardgegevens te kontrolearjen en te reparearjen. Dit kin in pear mominten duorje. Trochgean?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Dit sil earst alle dielde listen konvertearje nei per-swimlanelisten, dan wiskje lege listen dy't in dûbele list hawwe mei deselde titel mei kaarten. Allinnich echt oerstallige lege listen sille fuortsmiten wurde. Trochgean?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Dit sil in 'Lost Cards' swimlane meitsje en alle kaarten en listen mei ûntbrekkende swimlaneId of listId weromsette. Dit hat allinich ynfloed op net-argivearre items. Trochgean?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Dit sil ALLE argivearre swimbanen, listen en kaarten weromsette, sadat se wer sichtber binne. Alle items mei ûntbrekkende ID's wurde automatysk reparearre. Dit kin net maklik ûngedien makke wurde. Trochgean?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Dit sil ûntbrekkende of beskeadige listen yn 'e boerdstruktuer detektearje en reparearje. Trochgean?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Dit sil avatar-URL's bywurkje foar bestjoersleden om de juste opslach-backend te brûken. Trochgean?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Dit sil alle URL's fan bestânbylagen op dit boerd bywurkje om de juste opslachbackend te brûken. Trochgean?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Gjin ferlerne swimbanen, listen, of kaarten om te herstellen
migration-progress-note: Wachtsje asjebleaft wylst wy jo boerd migrearje nei de lêste struktuer...
conversion-info-text: Dizze konverzje wurdt ien kear per boerd útfierd en ferbetteret prestaasjes. Jo kinne trochgean mei it brûken fan it boerd normaal.
converting-board-description: Konvertearjen fan boardstruktuer foar ferbettere funksjonaliteit. Dit kin in pear mominten duorje.
database-migration-description: It bywurkjen fan databankstruktuer foar ferbettere funksjonaliteit en prestaasjes. Dit proses kin ferskate minuten duorje.
migration-batch-size-description: Oantal taheaksels om te ferwurkjen yn elke batch (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Paus migraasje as CPU-gebrûk dit persintaazje grutter is (10-90)
migration-info-text: Databankmigraasjes wurde ien kear útfierd en ferbetterje systeemprestaasjes. It proses giet troch op 'e eftergrûn sels as jo jo browser slute.
migration-warning-text: Slút jo blêder asjebleaft net by migraasje. It proses sil trochgean op 'e eftergrûn, mar kin langer duorje om te foltôgjen.
monitoring-export-failed: It eksportearjen fan tafersjochgegevens is mislearre
account-locked: Akkount is tydlik beskoattele fanwegen tefolle mislearre oanmeldpogingen. Besykje it letter nochris.
username-too-short: Brûkersnamme moat op syn minst 3 karakters wêze
account-created: Account oanmakke! Jo kinne no oanmelde.
account-creation-failed: It oanmeitsjen fan akkount is mislearre
